title: Aliens Found in US? White House Launches 'Aliens.gov' Using UFO Themes To Track Real-Time Immigration Data
description: The White House launched Aliens.gov, a space-themed website using UFO disclosure language to display real-time immigration data. Featuring a live counter of three million migrant encounters and a searchable ICE arrest heat map, the platform explicitly blends public interest in UAPs with the administration's core border enforcement agenda.

title: Is Steven Spielberg’s New UFO Movie A Government Psyop?!
description: Steven Spielberg’s upcoming alien movie “Disclosure Day” is getting rave reviews. But Glenn Beck asks two questions: First, is it just a coincidence that this movie is coming out at the same time as the government is releasing UFO files? And more importantly, is there an even more powerful propaganda machine than Hollywood on the [...] The post Is Steven Spielberg’s New UFO Movie A Government Psyop?! appeared first on CBNC .

title: White House Prepares for Potential UFO Disclosure Amid Rising Public Concern
description: The White House is intensifying preparations for a possible formal announcement regarding Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) and non-human intelligence, according to investigative journalist Jeremy Corbell. Corbell claims he has been advising administration officials on communications strategy for the past six months, as the government releases new, harder-to-dismiss evidence. The move follows a second batch of declassified files, including videos of a UFO accelerating over Syria and a disc-shaped object over the Hindu Kush. Parallel reports suggest consultations with religious leaders, including the Vatican, to mitigate societal shock, while Vice President JD Vance frames the issue through a Christian lens, calling potential entities 'demons.' The administration is reportedly considering a range of outcomes amid fears of public disorder, market turmoil, and a crisis of faith if extraterrestrial life is confirmed.

title: Secret White House advisor leaks US plan to avert mass panic over the disclosure of alien life: UFO investigator CHRIS SHARP
description: Global markets tumbling. Chaos in the streets. A complete loss of confidence religion. This is the previously unthinkable, near-future that the White House is contemplating.
